channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 2026 Super Bowl Gatorade Odds: What Color Will the Winning Bath Be?
item.description: Will yellow shine bright for the second year in a row, or will another color snag the spotlight? Here are the odds for the Super Bowl Gatorade bath.

item.title: Jeremy Fears' 26 Points Help No. 10 Michigan State Beat No. 5 Illinois in OT
item.description: Jeremy Fears Jr. scored 26 points to help No. 10 Michigan State hold on for an 85-82 OT win over No. 5 Illinois on Saturday.

item.title: Where All 32 NFL Teams Stood When Seahawks and Patriots Last Met in Super Bowl
item.description: Here's what was going on with all 32 NFL teams the last time that the Patriots and Seahawks met in the Super Bowl (Feb. 2015).

item.title: NFL Confidential: Hall of Fame Changes Coming; Tush Push Under the Microscope
item.description: Fellow Hall of Famers weigh in on changes they believe should be made to the voting process after Bill Belichick failed to get in as a first-time cand...

item.title: 10 Best Championship Games Since 2000, From Patriots-Falcons to Dodgers-Blue Jays
item.description: FOX Sports' experts look back at the 10 best championship matchups across sports this century.

item.title: Men's Bubble Watch: Welcome to new locks Kentucky, NC State, Villanova, Saint Louis
item.description: The dust settles following a big Saturday, with some new locks, some promotions and some demotions.

item.title: Transfer rumors, news: Man United to rival Man City for long-throw king Kayode
item.description: Manchester United and Newcastle have joined Manchester City in the race to sign Brentford wing back Michael Kayode. Transfer Talk has the latest.

item.title: 'It's over. Guys are gone': What James Harden and the Clippers realized before the shocking trade
item.description: The Harden trade was a mutual recognition as much as an admission -- that the 11-time All-Star had a better chance to win elsewhere, and a tumultuous ...

item.title: Bracketology: Saint Louis could be a real threat come March
item.description: The Billikens are an analytical unicorn -- and shaping up to be the Atlantic 10's next generational team.

item.title: 2026 Milan Cortina Olympics: Lindsey Vonn crashes, Breezy Johnson wins downhill and more live updates from Sunday
item.description: The 2026 Milan Cortina Olympics continue. Follow along live with the top highlights from Sunday, which include women's downhill skiing, figure skating...
